    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    NameTestImpl
    An implementation of Name for test purposes.
    ResourceBundleImpl
    A simple implementation of ResourceBundle for testing purposes.
    TestBaseClass
    A base class for JUnit test classes.
    TestDataBase<E>
    This class is meant as the base class for test data records.
    TestUtils
    Some methods that are useful in the context of testing.
